findings.message: deno.json `license` field missing (must be `MIT` for alpha)
mod.ts has 62 non-export/non-comment lines — barrels must be export-only
exported function 'resetTriggerRegistry' uses non-standard prefix 'reset' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'dispatchTriggerEvent' uses non-standard prefix 'dispatch' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'resetTriggerEventStore' uses non-standard prefix 'reset' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
type 'FileLifecycleConfig' uses non-standard suffix — convention is <Function>Options / <Noun>Spec
type 'ActionChainConfig' uses non-standard suffix — convention is <Function>Options / <Noun>Spec
3 inline *_test.ts files outside tests/ — consolidate under tests/<layer>/
mod.ts does not export an `inspect<Noun>()` diagnostic — recommended discoverability axis
